================================================================================ 1. Cache de premier niveau: une identite Java par entite dans une transaction ================================================================================ 2026-05-02T23:01:27.592+02:00 DEBUG 26692 --- [hibernate-tutorial] [ main] org.hibernate.SQL : /* select p.id from Product p where p.sku = :sku */ select p1_0.id from products p1_0 where p1_0.sku=? 2026-05-02T23:01:27.592+02:00 TRACE 26692 --- [hibernate-tutorial] [ main] org.hibernate.orm.jdbc.bind : binding parameter (1:VARCHAR) <- [SKU-LAPTOP-PRO] 2026-05-02T23:01:27.592+02:00 DEBUG 26692 --- [hibernate-tutorial] [ main] org.hibernate.SQL : select p1_0.id, p1_0.name, p1_0.price, p1_0.sku, p1_0.stock_quantity from products p1_0 where p1_0.id=? 2026-05-02T23:01:27.592+02:00 TRACE 26692 --- [hibernate-tutorial] [ main] org.hibernate.orm.jdbc.bind : binding parameter (1:BIGINT) <- [1] Meme instance Java avant clear() : true EntityManager contient l'entite : true Prix lu depuis firstLoad apres setter : 777.77 Prix lu depuis secondLoad : 777.77 2026-05-02T23:01:27.600+02:00 DEBUG 26692 --- [hibernate-tutorial] [ main] org.hibernate.SQL : select p1_0.id, p1_0.name, p1_0.price, p1_0.sku, p1_0.stock_quantity from products p1_0 where p1_0.id=? 2026-05-02T23:01:27.600+02:00 TRACE 26692 --- [hibernate-tutorial] [ main] org.hibernate.orm.jdbc.bind : binding parameter (1:BIGINT) <- [1] Meme instance Java apres clear() : false Produit recharge : SKU-LAPTOP-PRO - Ultrabook renomme dans le cache (1299.00 EUR) - La transaction est rollback-only pour que ce setter reste une demonstration sans effet durable.
================================================================================ 2a. Sans transaction de service: modification d'une entite detachee ================================================================================ 2026-05-02T23:01:27.628+02:00 DEBUG 26692 --- [hibernate-tutorial] [ main] org.hibernate.SQL : /* SELECT p FROM Product p WHERE p.sku = :sku */ select p1_0.id, p1_0.name, p1_0.price, p1_0.sku, p1_0.stock_quantity from products p1_0 where p1_0.sku=? 2026-05-02T23:01:27.628+02:00 TRACE 26692 --- [hibernate-tutorial] [ main] org.hibernate.orm.jdbc.bind : binding parameter (1:VARCHAR) <- [SKU-HEADSET-BT] 2026-05-02T23:01:27.630+02:00 DEBUG 26692 --- [hibernate-tutorial] [ main] org.hibernate.SQL : /* SELECT p FROM Product p WHERE p.sku = :sku */ select p1_0.id, p1_0.name, p1_0.price, p1_0.sku, p1_0.stock_quantity from products p1_0 where p1_0.sku=? 2026-05-02T23:01:27.630+02:00 TRACE 26692 --- [hibernate-tutorial] [ main] org.hibernate.orm.jdbc.bind : binding parameter (1:VARCHAR) <- [SKU-HEADSET-BT] - Le changement local n'est pas persiste, car aucun Persistence Context n'est actif autour du use case. ================================================================================ 2b. Transaction read-only: setter + save explicite ne modifient pas la base ================================================================================ 2026-05-02T23:01:27.634+02:00 DEBUG 26692 --- [hibernate-tutorial] [ main] org.hibernate.SQL : /* SELECT p FROM Product p WHERE p.sku = :sku */ select p1_0.id, p1_0.name, p1_0.price, p1_0.sku, p1_0.stock_quantity from products p1_0 where p1_0.sku=? 2026-05-02T23:01:27.634+02:00 TRACE 26692 --- [hibernate-tutorial] [ main] org.hibernate.orm.jdbc.bind : binding parameter (1:VARCHAR) <- [SKU-KEYBOARD-MECH] Transaction Spring read-only : true Transaction Hibernate read-only : true Flush mode Hibernate : MANUAL Meme instance apres save(...) : true Prix initial : 119.90 Prix modifie en memoire : 129.90 - Regardez les logs SQL: aucun UPDATE du clavier n'est attendu au commit de cette transaction read-only. 2026-05-02T23:01:27.639+02:00 DEBUG 26692 --- [hibernate-tutorial] [ main] org.hibernate.SQL : /* SELECT p FROM Product p WHERE p.sku = :sku */ select p1_0.id, p1_0.name, p1_0.price, p1_0.sku, p1_0.stock_quantity from products p1_0 where p1_0.sku=? 2026-05-02T23:01:27.639+02:00 TRACE 26692 --- [hibernate-tutorial] [ main] org.hibernate.orm.jdbc.bind : binding parameter (1:VARCHAR) <- [SKU-KEYBOARD-MECH] Prix relu apres transaction read-only : 119.90

Self-invocation: appeler une methode @Transactional de la meme classe ne passe pas par le proxy ================================================================================ 2026-05-02T23:01:27.639+02:00 DEBUG 26692 --- [hibernate-tutorial] [ main] org.hibernate.SQL : /* SELECT p FROM Product p WHERE p.sku = :sku */ select p1_0.id, p1_0.name, p1_0.price, p1_0.sku, p1_0.stock_quantity from products p1_0 where p1_0.sku=? 2026-05-02T23:01:27.639+02:00 TRACE 26692 --- [hibernate-tutorial] [ main] org.hibernate.orm.jdbc.bind : binding parameter (1:VARCHAR) <- [SKU-HEADSET-BT] Transaction active dans la methode annotee : false 2026-05-02T23:01:27.647+02:00 DEBUG 26692 --- [hibernate-tutorial] [ main] org.hibernate.SQL : /* SELECT p FROM Product p WHERE p.sku = :sku */ select p1_0.id, p1_0.name, p1_0.price, p1_0.sku, p1_0.stock_quantity from products p1_0 where p1_0.sku=? 2026-05-02T23:01:27.648+02:00 TRACE 26692 --- [hibernate-tutorial] [ main] org.hibernate.orm.jdbc.bind : binding parameter (1:VARCHAR) <- [SKU-HEADSET-BT] Prix modifie en memoire dans la methode annotee : 2.00 2026-05-02T23:01:27.648+02:00 DEBUG 26692 --- [hibernate-tutorial] [ main] org.hibernate.SQL : /* SELECT p FROM Product p WHERE p.sku = :sku */ select p1_0.id, p1_0.name, p1_0.price, p1_0.sku, p1_0.stock_quantity from products p1_0 where p1_0.sku=? 2026-05-02T23:01:27.650+02:00 TRACE 26692 --- [hibernate-tutorial] [ main] org.hibernate.orm.jdbc.bind : binding parameter (1:VARCHAR) <- [SKU-HEADSET-BT] Prix avant self-invocation : 149.90 Prix apres self-invocation : 149.90 Modification persistee : false - Conclusion: l'annotation @Transactional n'a pas ete appliquee, car l'appel n'est pas passe par le proxy Spring.

================================================================================ 5. Isolation: READ_COMMITTED vs REPEATABLE_READ avec deux transactions ================================================================================ 2026-05-02T23:01:27.739+02:00 DEBUG 26692 --- [hibernate-tutorial] [ main] org.hibernate.SQL : /* select p.price from Product p where p.sku = :sku */ select p1_0.price from products p1_0 where p1_0.sku=?
